title: Video: Hawaii's Kilauea Volcano Erupts, Shooting Over 1,000 Feet Of Lava Into The Air
summary_full: Kilauea volcano on Hawaii's Big Island has erupted again, sending lava fountains up to 1,000 feet into the air in the 43rd eruptive episode since December 2024.
summary_public: Kilauea volcano on Hawaii's Big Island has erupted again, sending lava fountains up to 1,000 feet into the air in the 43rd eruptive episode since December 2024.
